summary: Site has 6 active stat drifts. PR #1258 fixes 3 (invariants/patterns/event kinds) but is blocked by CI/branch-protection mismatch — site-only PRs cannot merge without admin action (#1267). Two new drifts found this cycle: CLI commands (29→32, #1265) and action types (27/9→41/10, #1266). Swarm section (#1259) and v2.9.x announcement (#1260) remain open from prior cycle. P0 escalation: CI mismatch blocking all site squad merges.

siteBuild.notes: Static site structure intact: index.html, posts.html, shellforge.html, posts.json, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, og-image.png all present.

drift.location: og:description, JSON-LD, hero, kernel card, policy bullet, safety card h3, invariants section h2
kernel card, policy bullet, destructive patterns card h3
Full Audit Trail card, Pipeline Emit stage

drift.fixStatus: open — regressed from a998ba2 by c05b1bd (#1224)

drift.codebase: 7 squads (design, hq, kernel, marketing, qa, site, studio)

verified: action types: 41 across 10 classes — confirmed via packages/core/src/data/actions.json
CLI commands: 32 top-level — confirmed via apps/cli/src/commands/

blockers.title: fix(site): sync stats to v2.9.0 — invariants 24, patterns 93, event kinds 47
blockers.blockReason: lint + test-and-build required checks never trigger for site/** changes (paths-ignore in size-check.yml). Filed as #1267.

issuesTracked.title: Swarm section audit — 26 agents/5 tiers stale

structuralRisk.regressionPattern: Partial site syncs (e.g. #1224) overwrite previously-fixed claims. No automated stat validation gate exists. Every new sync PR risks regressing prior fixes.
structuralRisk.recommendation: Add a site-stats-check script that greps site/index.html for all numeric claims and validates them against codebase sources. Run as a required check in a new site-check.yml workflow.

blockers.description: All site PRs are unmergeable via normal workflow. Requires admin merge or CI fix. Affects entire site squad's ability to ship content.

escalations.action: Human/infra intervention required. Options: (A) add skip-ci bypass job to size-check.yml for site/** changes, (B) create dedicated site-check.yml workflow registered as required check, (C) admin-merge pending site PRs as one-time bypass. Blocking all site squad merges.

nextActions: ESCALATE to HQ: #1267 CI mismatch must be resolved to unblock all site PRs
site-builder: batch #1265 + #1266 + #1258 scope into a single comprehensive stats-sync PR once CI is fixed
site-docs-sync: audit swarm section (#1259) — tally actual agents per squad, update framing from 'tiers' to 'squads'
site-builder: draft v2.9.x announcement content (#1260) — wildcard policy fix, Go evaluator parity, deepagents adapter
Long-term: site-stats-check automation script to prevent regression
